event: UFC Fight Night: Kape vs. Horiguchi

items.fight_news: A highly anticipated flyweight rematch headlines the event as former RIZIN champion Manel Kape takes on fellow former champion Kyoji Horiguchi.
The narrative centers on whether Horiguchi's elusive style can outsmart the devastating power and aggression Kape brings to the Octagon.
Light heavyweight action sees the always entertaining Ion Cutelaba welcoming the undefeated Navajo Stirling.
Fans can expect a fiery start, testing whether Stirling's perfect record holds up under Cutelaba's trademark early onslaught.
Veteran Andre Fili steps up to the plate to replace an injured fighter, facing the dangerous Vinicius Oliveira.
This matchup is a classic test of Fili's vast UFC experience against Oliveira's hunger to climb the featherweight ladder.
Two promising featherweights look to make a statement as the undefeated Hyder Amil collides with the technical Christian Rodriguez.
The analytical focus is on Rodriguez's composure when faced with Amil's relentless forward pressure.
Undefeated prospect André Lima looks to keep his perfect record intact against the gritty Kevin Borjas.
It is a phenomenal showcase of striking arts in the flyweight division.
A classic striker versus grappler showdown awaits as the kickboxing specialist Baghdasaryan meets the wrestling heavy Magomedov.
The fighter who imposes their preferred venue of combat will undoubtedly leave with their hand raised.
Grappling royalty enters the cage as Beatriz Mesquita puts her undefeated MMA record on the line against Melissa Mullins.
Mullins faces the ultimate test of keeping the fight standing against a legendary submission artist.
Flyweight contenders look to break through the rankings as veteran Nascimento squares off against Raposo.
Raposo will look to utilize his speed advantage to counter the rangy attacks of the Brazilian veteran.

bouts.title: Gaston Bolanos vs. Michael Aswell Jr.

items.fight_news: Fans can expect fireworks as the flashy striking of Gaston Bolanos meets the calculated approach of Michael Aswell Jr..
Bolanos is known for highlight reel finishes and will surely look to add another one to his collection.
An all Brazilian bantamweight clash pits the battle tested Karol Rosa against the rising Luana Santos.
This bout will heavily influence the trajectory of the top fifteen rankings.
Leon Shahbazyan makes his highly anticipated UFC debut looking to capitalize on his massive finishing streak against Levan Chokheli.
The pressure is on Shahbazyan to prove his regional dominance translates perfectly to the big stage.
Two newcomers aim to start their UFC careers with a bang as the undefeated Shane Collins faces Otari Tanzilovi.
With both men possessing impressive finishing rates, the judges are unlikely to be needed for this preliminary opener.
